summary: Diff updates backend to include blob-storage-based photo attachment/retrieval APIs and updates project_state metadata, but does not add any static image assets under frontend/public/assets/generated and does not provide clear evidence that seeded items’ photo fields were updated to local /assets/generated/... paths.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add the missing static image assets under `frontend/public/assets/generated` for the photo filenames referenced by backend seeded items.
missing_requirements.reason: No files were added under `frontend/public/assets/generated`; diff shows no added image assets at all.
evidence: File diff summary: Added: 0 (no new files)

missing_requirements.requirement: Ensure every clothing item returned by backend `searchItems` has a non-empty, valid local photo path starting with `/assets/generated/`.
missing_requirements.reason: The shown backend changes introduce blob-storage for photos, but the diff excerpt does not show seeded `ClothingItem.photo` values being set to non-empty `/assets/generated/...` paths; seed data portion is truncated before `photo` fields are visible.
evidence: backend/main.mo (truncated seed initialization; `photo` values not shown)

missing_requirements.requirement: Update backend seeded `photo` filenames to exactly match the generated static asset filenames under `frontend/public/assets/generated`.
missing_requirements.reason: No static assets were added and the diff excerpt does not show any explicit updates to seeded `photo` filenames; seed data is truncated so exact filename matching cannot be verified.
evidence: File diff summary: Added: 0 (no assets added)

hallucinated_features.description: Backend blob-storage integration (MixinStorage/Storage) and per-item photo blob storage map (`itemPhotos`).
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest requires images to be served as static frontend assets and explicitly says not to proxy static images through the backend; blob-storage-based serving/management is not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: New backend APIs to attach and retrieve item photos via the canister (`attachPhotoToItem`, `getItemPhoto`).
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by REQ-1/2/3, and conflicts with the constraint to serve images as static frontend assets (no backend proxy).
